label: AIPAC
info: American Israel Public Affairs Committee. Primary force for US-Israel military aid. Spends $100M+ per election cycle via bundled contributions and direct PAC spending.

label: United Democracy Project (AIPAC Super PAC)
info: AIPAC's Super PAC arm. Spent $25M+ in the 2022 primaries alone. Directly funds campaigns to ensure a pro-Israel Senate majority.

label: JINSA
info: Jewish Institute for National Security of America. Integrates US defense policy with Israeli strategic interests. Key pipeline for generals and admirals to visit Israel.

label: CUFI
info: Christians United for Israel. 10M+ member evangelical lobby. Critical vote-mobilization tool for Israel aid legislation.

label: American Petroleum Institute
info: The oil industry's main lobbying body. Spends $8M+/year in direct lobbying. Coordinates joint campaigns with ExxonMobil, Chevron.

label: Aerospace Industries Association
info: Defense industry's main lobbying trade group. Represents Lockheed, Boeing, Northrop, RTX. $15M+ annual lobbying spend.

label: PNAC (Project for New American Century)
info: Neoconservative think tank (1997-2006). Published 'Rebuilding America's Defenses' calling for regime change in Iraq years pre-9/11. Key members became Bush administration officials.
